title: Basic JavaScript Node.js Express
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Node.js Express. Focus on implementing Express setup correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Node.js Express
description: Create a function that uses Express setup and Routing (app.get, app.post) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Node.js Express Project
description: Build a small application that applies Express setup, Routing (app.get, app.post), Middleware functions in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Node.js Express
description: The following code has bugs related to Express setup. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Node.js Express
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Express setup and Routing (app.get, app.post).
